product: Delta Sharing views automatically permitted in serverless network policies
tagline: Delta Sharing views are now permitted when using serverless network policies, regardless of storage location alignment between shared tables and view dependencies.
what_it_does: Delta Sharing views are now permitted when using serverless network policies, regardless of storage location alignment between shared tables and view dependencies. This removes the previous limitation and simplifies network policy configuration for Delta Sharing workloads. This page explains how to configure and manage network policies to control outbound network connections from your serverless workloads in Databricks.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.

capabilities.desc: If your notebook does not interact with Spark, you can terminate then reattach serverless compute to refresh the network policy.
